free_text: Cross Sections for Gamma-Ray Production by 14-MeV
Neutrons.
Tritons on deuterium.
Shielded NaI(Tl) crystal and photomultiplier
system
Flux calculated from the geometry, triton beam current,
deuterium gas pressure, and D(t,n) cross section.
Data corrected for background, response functions,
flux measurements, and multiple scattering.
Following errors added in quadrature to the
statistical uncertainty to produce the total errors
given:
flux uncertainty (7%),
errors in unfolding program (5%),
multiple scattering corrections (<5%),
measurement of sample position (3%),
gamma-ray detector efficiency (3-12%).
Approved by D.M.Drake, 1978/2/2.
Data published in Table II of Nucl.Sci.Eng.65(1978)49
must be multiplied by 10 and treated as double
differential cross sections in mb/sr/MeV (modification
approved by Darrell Drake, 2017-06-27) (N.Otsuka)
Error headings corrected.
Formats updated; BIB updates.
BIB update.
On. Coded info. (ERR-1 to ERR-4) added
VM: Updated error coding.
OS. Data in subs.2-19 modified as described
in COMMENT. COMMENT added in sub.1.
